response.justification: Candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role: no recent or substantial professional C++ experience (only a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain background. The skill stack centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than C++ on Windows with financial systems.
strengths: Solid software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Brief prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Strong communication skills demonstrated through talks, workshops, and teaching
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ experience; most recent C++ work was ~10 years ago
No SQL Server or Oracle experience listed; database experience is MongoDB/MySQL
No capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform focus
